device.description: Primary core ruter for datacenter segmant A
device.status: The deivce is currantly aktive and forewarding packats normaly.

interfaces.name: GigabitEthernet0/0/1
interfaces.notes: Konfiguerd with OSPF area 0 for dynaimc routeing redistrebution.

interfaces.name: GigabitEthernet0/0/2
interfaces.notes: Trunking enabled with VLANs 10, 20 and 30 for segragation of trafic.

bgp.status: BGP sesion estabilshed with upstream ISP peer.
bgp.notes: Advertiseing defualt rout via BGP to all nighbor peers in AS 65001.

ospf.status: OSPF adjecency is up on all configerd interfases.
ospf.notes: Redistributeing static routs into OSPF for propergation across the netwerk.

mpls.status: MPLS labal switching is enabeled on core interfases.
mpls.notes: LDP sesions are estabilshed with all adjasent PE routers in the MPLS doamin.

firewall.policy: Inbound ACL is appyed to deny unautherised acess from untrusted subnets.
firewall.notes: IPsec tunnnel is configerd for sight-to-sight VPN with the DR datacenter.

tls.notes: All managment trafic is encripted using TLS 1.3 to prevent eaves-dropping.

snmp.status: SNMP v3 is konfiguerd for securre pollling of devce metriks.
snmp.notes: Traps are forwared to the NMS for reeal-time alart procesing.

syslog.notes: Syslog mesages are sentto the centralized log agragator for auditting and complianse.
